iteration1_baseline.notes: Original verbose 297-line SKILL.md with 10 extra reference files

iteration2_optimized.notes: Condensed to ~55-line SKILL.md with exact fix patterns, removed all extra files

changes: Replaced 297-line verbose systematic debugging framework with concise 55-line actionable guide

Removed 10 unreferenced support files (root-cause-tracing.md, defense-in-depth.md, condition-based-waiting.md, condition-based-waiting-example.ts, find-polluter.sh, CREATION-LOG.md, test-academic.md, test-pressure-1.md, test-pressure-2.md, test-pressure-3.md)

Added clear 4-step process: read, identify root cause, write complete fix, run tests
Updated frontmatter name and description to be more specific
